channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Hackers have compromised dozens of popular open source packages in an ongoing supply chain attack
item.description: The attacks are part of a wider campaign known as Mini Shai-Hulud, which has already compromised several open source projects and, in turn, developers and companies that use them.

item.title: À voir absolument : ce soir, trois astres brillants nous donnent rendez-vous à la tombée de la nuit
item.description: Un alignement de plusieurs astres notables est à admirer ce 19 mai au soir. On pourra voir ensemble Vénus, Jupiter et même la Lune ! En tout cas, si la météo le veut bien.

item.title: Samsung's has produced the world's first 6K gaming monitor
item.description: Samsung's new displays include a 6K gaming monitor and a larger version of the MovingStyle.

item.title: Stuck in a pit of revision doom? Here are my study essentials to boost focus and ease the panic
item.description: Study aids to help make that A Level or GCSE revision mountain easier to scale.

item.title: Analyse de données biopharmaceutiques | Cohere rachète Reliant AI
item.description: Cohere annonce lundi l’acquisition d’une plateforme d’analyse de données active dans le secteur biopharmaceutique.

item.title: CISA contractor apparently leaked 'highly sensitive' government AWS keys on Github
item.description: The leak was so bad, researchers initially thought it was a joke.

item.title: Spotify is launching verification badges for podcasts to help listeners avoid AI slop
item.description: The platform recently did something similar for music.

item.title: Google I/O 2026 live — Gemini upgrades, Android XR, and more of what to expect from today's big software showcase
item.description: Google I/O 2026 kicks off today, and we're reporting live on all the latest updates.

item.title: Un nouveau géant du vélo électrique par abonnement est né : Swapfiets rachète Dance
item.description: Swapfiets met la main sur Dance, son concurrent berlinois sur le créneau du vélo électrique par abonnement. L'opération crée le premier acteur européen du secteur, avec 75 000 vélos en circulation.

item.title: US cyber agency CISA exposed reams of passwords and cloud keys to the open web
item.description: The federal cybersecurity agency left plaintext passwords in a spreadsheet uploaded to a public GitHub repository, per a report by independent journalist Brian Krebs.

item.title: Orange lance enfin son répéteur Wi-Fi 7 en France, et il y a une petite surprise
item.description: Free, Bouygues et SFR proposent déjà un répéteur Wi-Fi 7 à leurs abonnés. Orange, l'opérateur historique, arrive bon dernier. Mais il ne vient pas les mains vides.

item.title: Former OpenAI Staffers Warn xAI's Poor Safety Record Could Complicate SpaceX’s IPO
item.description: The ex-employees, who cofounded a new AI watchdog group, say investors deserve more information about xAI’s safety practices before SpaceX goes public.

item.title: World of Tanks: HEAT, Wargaming's new standalone and free-to-play tactical vehicle shooter, officially launches later this month
item.description: Waragaming Group has announced that World of Tanks: HEAT, its new free-to-play vehicle shooter, will officially launch on May 26, 2026.

item.title: Worried about the future of the internet? Tor launches crypto-powered fundraising initiative to secure internet freedoms — and your vote matters more than your wallet size
item.description: Internet freedom is facing a funding crisis. Here is how the Tor Project's new crypto-powered crowdfunding campaign aims to sustain vital privacy-preserving and anti-censorship tools through "quadratic funding."

item.title: Miniature cameras are trending, and you can't get smaller than these 9 digital models — and they all cost under $50
item.description: Mini cameras are on trend, and you can't get smaller than these 9 affordable digital models

item.title: America’s dangerous, messy deepfakes crackdown is here
item.description: A law requiring social networks to quickly remove sexual deepfakes and other nonconsensual imagery is now fully in force. But experts warn the policy could do little to help victims - and at worst could facilitate censorship online. Last May, President Donald Trump signed the Take It Down Act, a law addressing nonconsensual intimate imagery […]

item.title: Apple’s accessibility features add more AI-powered processing
item.description: Apple's annual update about accessibility features on its platforms has new additions for the iPhone, Mac, and especially Vision Pro, with a focus on how on-device AI processing is being used in features like VoiceOver, Magnifier, Voice Control, and Accessibility Reader. One addition that jumped out to me is the ability to use on-device speech […]

item.title: JBL PartyBox Stage 320 : cette enceinte de soirée bradée à -33 % devient difficile à ignorer
item.description: La JBL PartyBox Stage 320 s’impose comme une enceinte de soirée particulièrement réussie, comme en témoigne sa note de 9/10. Déjà très convaincante, elle devient encore plus intéressante en ce moment grâce à une belle promotion : elle passe à 399 euros au lieu de 599 euros.

item.title: L’Europe déclare la guerre aux onduleurs chinois, Pékin prépare sa riposte
item.description: Un bras de fer est en train de s’engager entre deux grandes puissances. D'un côté, une Europe déterminée à reprendre le contrôle de certains composants énergétiques sensibles ; de l'autre, une Chine offensée, et bien décidée à ne pas se laisser faire.

item.title: There's a massive summer speaker sale at Best Buy — up to $250 JBL, Beats, Sonos, Sony, and more
item.description: You can score massive savings on best-selling speakers at Best Buy's Memorial Day sale, including up to $250 from brands like JBL, Bose, Beats, Sonos, and more.

item.title: The OpenAI lawsuit became a master class in what not to put in writing
item.description: As private messages from Elon Musk, Greg Brockman, and other tech leaders spilled into public view, the trial underscored a growing reality of corporate life: nothing stays private forever. Elon Musk’s loss in his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI, decided on Monday by a jury and upheld by a judge, wasn’t the only damaging revelation to emerge from the California courtroom. The two-week trial also punctured the carefully managed public images of some of the most prominent figures shaping AI for hundreds of millions of people....

item.title: Galileo : qu’est-ce que c’est, quel est son avantage et quels sont les smartphones compatibles ?
item.description: 20 ans après, l’affranchissement du système GPS américain. L’Europe avait déjà les fusées Ariane et les avions Airbus, voilà donc le tour des satellites de navigation Galileo. Vous ne savez pas qu'est ce que c'est ? Voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir sur Galileo.

item.title: Fortnite est enfin de retour sur l’App Store, c’est officiel
item.description: Fortnite revient nativement sur l'App Store après un conflit juridique de plusieurs années entre Epic Games et Apple.

item.title: NYC Health + Hospitals says mega data breach allowed hackers to steal personal data, medical records, and fingerprints scans of around 1.8 million people
item.description: Fingerprints and palm prints can never be changed, which makes this attack that much more dangerous.

item.title: Why autonomy alone fails and what truly builds trustworthy AI systems
item.description: Why treating Agentic AI like the human body is the key to high performance.

item.title: 'Some aspects are as we intended and some are not' — Mullvad addresses WireGuard exit-IP fingerprinting concern after researcher flags privacy risk
item.description: Is your VPN traffic as anonymous as you think? A security researcher just found a way to fingerprint Mullvad VPN users through exit IP patterns, prompting a swift response and an ongoing infrastructure patch from the provider.

item.title: Bonne nouvelle, le mode Dolby Vision Filmmaker débarque sur les anciens TV TCL sous Google TV de 2025, 2024 et 2023
item.description: TCL déploie actuellement une mise à jour qui ajoute le Dolby Vision Filmmaker Mode, tout en élargissant le support du Filmmaker Mode sur d’anciens modèles de TV et apporte plusieurs autres nouvelles fonctionnalités intéressantes. On fait le point.

item.title: iOS 27 : comment Apple Intelligence va transformer l’iPhone de millions d’utilisateurs
item.description: Apple vient de dévoiler les nouvelles fonctions d'accessibilité qui garniront iOS 27 et on y parle d'Apple Intelligence.

item.title: Kroger gets swept up in the growing wave of Salmonella snack food recalls: Avoid this product sold in 17 states
item.description: Milk powder linked to California Dairies has sparked yet another recall over fears of contamination. Here’s the latest and what you need to know. Grocery giant Kroger Co. is the latest in a growing number of companies whose brands have been impacted by potential Salmonella contamination involving milk powder.

item.title: Google I/O 2026 : suivez la keynote en direct sur notre chaîne Twitch dès 18h30
item.description: La Google I/O 2026 a lieu ce mardi 19 mai à 19 heures, heure française. Frandroid tiendra un live Twitch dès 18h30 pour commenter à chaud les annonces, en parallèle du liveblog écrit.

item.title: Apple announces Apple Intelligence powered accessibility feature updates
item.description: Apple is introducing a feature to let Vision Pro control a compatible wheelchair with their eyes

item.title: The Zuckerbergs Are Hiring a Lifeguard but Calling It a ‘Beach Water Person’
item.description: The job, which is associated with the Zuckerberg family office, is located in Kauai, Hawaii, where the Meta CEO owns a massive compound.

item.title: ‘Survivor’ stars Kyle Fraser and Kamilla Karthigesu introduce a goal-tracking app, Paprclip
item.description: A new app from Survivor 48 winner Kyle Fraser and castmate Kamilla Karthigesu aims to turn goal tracking into a social experience, pairing users for accountability, daily challenges, and shared progress clips.

item.title: Forget the feed: Status AI raises $17M to turn social media into interactive entertainment
item.description: Interactive social media site Status announced Tuesday $17 million in combined seed and Series A funding, with investors including General Catalyst, YC, LightShed Ventures, and Abstract.

item.title: These 12 audiobooks taught me more about marketing than my business degree
item.description: Forget ridiculous tuition fees, these audiobooks will teach you everything you need to know about marketing

item.title: 'Beth still wants to protect it': Dutton Ranch star on why including John Dutton's Yellowstone legacy in new Taylor Sheridan spinoff was a non-negotiable
item.description: In Yellowstone, John Dutton felt like the be-all and end-all of the family's story. But even though new spinoff Dutton Ranch is a world away, he remains Beth's "reason to live."

item.title: Anker fixes the two worst things about power stations
item.description: Anker's Solix S2000 solves two major pain points with power stations: idle power draw that can leave a battery unexpectedly dead, and the large footprint required to hold so much energy. Impressively, it achieves this at an incredibly low introductory price that works out to just $0.29 per Wh. Unlike most other power stations in […]

item.title: Avast unveils revolutionary new modular antivirus platform – industry leading device protection & scam detection, with optional no-log VPN, data breach monitoring, and device cleanup
item.description: Avast's new modular platform allows users to pick and choose exactly what features they want to use.

item.title: 7 ways to supercharge your email marketing campaign
item.description: From smarter segmentation to deliverability basics, these seven email marketing strategies can help you drive better engagement and higher ROI from every campaign you send.

item.title: Game Pass en mai 2026 : Forza Horizon 6, Subnautica 2, The Outer Worlds… Voici la deuxième vague de jeux du mois
item.description: Microsoft vient d'annoncer la deuxième vague de jeux qui seront intégrés au Game Pass, alors que Forza Horizon 6 est aujourd'hui disponible pour tous !

item.title: Les pilotes Windows 11 qui drainent la batterie de votre PC portable, c’est bientôt fini
item.description: Pendant des années, Microsoft a laissé passer des pilotes Windows avec un effet désastreux sur l'autonomie des ordinateurs portables. La firme s'attaque enfin au problème.

item.title: Crise de la RAM : un expert de Samsung annonce une fin de calvaire beaucoup plus rapide que prévu
item.description: Alors que la crise de la RAM, et plus globalement la pénurie des composants, bat son plein, l'un des conseillers experts de Samsung prévoit une sortie de crise pour le second semestre 2027 grâce aux nouveaux acteurs chinois.

item.title: Marshall Milton A.N.C. le casque qui peut rester longtemps sur vos oreilles
item.description: Marshall enrichit sa ligne audio avec le Milton A.N.C., un casque sans fil supra-aural pensé pour les usages mobiles, les déplacements répétés et les longues séances d’écoute. Compact, pliable, il embarque une fonction de réduction de bruit et peut tenir jusqu’à 50 heures avec une seule charge.
